ogTitle: Jumbuk vs Junction Village: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jumbuk and Junction Village.
heading: Jumbuk vs Junction Village — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jumbuk, Victoria and Junction Village, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Junction Village has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Jumbuk (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jumbuk or Junction Village safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jumbuk has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Junction Village scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jumbuk scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Junction Village scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jumbuk or Junction Village?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Junction Village has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
